_meta.purpose: Tier-2 platform brands added to the platform set for their own brand pages. Merged into cfg.platforms at generation. The platformFee text is a plain-language description of the platform's published commission (a business fact, sourced below), NOT a tax figure; keyDeductions are category deduction slugs. Every tax rate applied to these pages comes from the verified dataset.

sources.upwork: Upwork help — flat 10% freelancer service fee since May 2023 (support.upwork.com).
sources.uber_eats: Uber — couriers are independent contractors paid per delivery; service fees vary (uber.com).
sources.roadie: Roadie — drivers are independent contractors paid per gig (roadie.com).
sources.walmart_marketplace: Walmart Marketplace — referral fees 6%–15% by category (marketplace.walmart.com).
sources.depop: Depop — 10% selling fee plus payment processing (depop.com/whatsdepopfee).
sources.kick: Kick — 95/5 subscription revenue split in the streamer's favor (kick.com).
